title: system.scraper_circuit_closed (v1)
description: Published by the Ingestion Service when a circuit breaker recovers after a successful probe. Suspended scan jobs are automatically resumed; users are notified. See TDD Sections 3.2.1, 5.2.2.

retailer.description: The retailer whose scraper circuit has closed (recovered).

circuit_closed_at.description: Timestamp when the circuit closed (recovery confirmed).

downtime_minutes.description: Total minutes the circuit was open.

resumed_scan_job_count.description: Number of user scan jobs automatically resumed.

probe_success_at.description: Timestamp of the successful recovery probe request.
